summary: Regression testing after code quality refactoring. All refactored components (CustomerDetailPage, CaseDetailPage, AuditLogPage) render correctly with proper data flow to sub-components. Backend services (pdf_service.py, risk_service.py) working correctly. Fixed missing getPEPTierColor function in CustomerDetailPage.js.

fixed_issues.issue: Missing getPEPTierColor function - would cause runtime error when customer has PEP status

passed_tests: Backend: All 33 pytest tests passed (15 audit log + 18 case management)
Backend: Login authentication works
Backend: Audit log endpoints (list, filter, pagination, export CSV/PDF)
Backend: Case management endpoints (CRUD, notes, escalation, SAR filing, closure)
Backend: PEP screening endpoint
Backend: Adverse media screening endpoint
Backend: Bulk screening endpoint
Backend: Customer detail includes related cases
Frontend: Dashboard loads correctly
Frontend: Customers page loads with table
Frontend: Cases page loads with table
Frontend: CustomerDetailPage renders with all sub-components (PEPScreeningCard, AdverseMediaCard, CDDManagementCard, RelatedCasesCard)
Frontend: PEP Screening button works and shows results
Frontend: Adverse Media screening button works and shows results
Frontend: CDD tier badge displays correctly
Frontend: Related Cases section shows on Customer Detail Page
Frontend: CaseDetailPage renders with CaseNotes and CaseActions components
Frontend: Case notes (add note) works on open cases
Frontend: Case status/priority update works
Frontend: CaseActions hidden for closed cases (expected behavior)
Frontend: AuditLogPage loads with AuditLogFilters and AuditLogTable components
Frontend: Audit Log filters work (Action Type, User, Module, Date Range)
Frontend: Audit Log CSV export works
Frontend: Audit Log PDF export works
Frontend: All navigation works (Dashboard, Customers, Screening, Cases, Audit Logs, Settings)
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: CustomerDetailPage.js was missing getPEPTierColor function definition - would cause runtime error when displaying PEP badge for customers with PEP status
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing customer and cases from previous iterations.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Code refactoring regression test complete. All refactored components working correctly: CustomerDetailPage (378 lines) uses PEPScreeningCard, AdverseMediaCard, CDDManagementCard, RelatedCasesCard. CaseDetailPage (395 lines) uses CaseNotes, CaseActions. AuditLogPage (152 lines) uses AuditLogFilters, AuditLogTable. Backend services pdf_service.py and risk_service.py extracted and working. Fixed missing getPEPTierColor function in CustomerDetailPage.js. Screening services (PEP, Sanctions, Adverse Media) use MOCK data. Email service logs to console (MOCKED).

mocked_apis.screening_service.py: PEP, Sanctions, Adverse Media screening return random mock results
mocked_apis.email_service.py: Logs emails to console instead of sending

backend_services.risk_service.py: WORKING - calculates risk levels and CDD tiers
